items.title: DoorDash (DASH) Partners With Waffle House For All Night Delivery Nationwide
items.description: DoorDash (DASH) recently announced a partnership with Waffle House that introduces all-night delivery, aligning with Waffle House's 70th anniversary and adding a new dimension to both brands. Over the past quarter, DoorDash's stock experienced a 15% increase, which could be linked to several factors. These include strong earnings results with significant sales and net income growth, despite an absence of stock repurchases. The dynamic market landscape and DoorDash's countless strategic...

items.title: Mod Gen in Milwaukee's Third Ward to close after 25 years in business
items.description: Mod Gen, 211 N. Broadway, sells a range of plants, books, ceramics, kitchenware and other home goods.

items.title: This tea shop and cafe is opening a second location in Milwaukee's Third Ward
items.description: Angela Mallett is opening a second location of her popular herbal teashop, HoneyBee Sage & Apothecary, in the Third Ward in mid-September.

items.title: McDonald’s Chief Blasts Minimum Wage Loophole for Tipped Workers
items.description: McDonald's is battling its own industry over fast food workers' pay, which it believes should be better, and tips, which it opposes.

items.title: McDonald’s is giving its value menu another shakeup on Monday
items.description: McDonald’s latest attempt to bring back cost-conscious customers rolls out Monday with a slate of new deals.
